title: Parity snapshot — extension ETH position detail

extract.expression: (function(){ function t(id){var el=document.querySelector('[data-testid="'+id+'"]'); return el?((el.textContent||'').trim()||null):null;} function txt(el){return (el?.textContent||'').trim();} function lines(el){return (el?.innerText||el?.textContent||'').split(/\n+/).map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean);} function labelValue(label){ const candidates=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('p,span,div')).filter(el=>txt(el)===label); for(const el of candidates){ let cur=el.parentElement; for(let i=0;i<4 && cur;i++,cur=cur.parentElement){ const l=lines(cur); if(l.includes(label)&&l.length<=6){ const vals=l.filter(x=>x!==label); if(vals.length) return vals[vals.length-1]; } } } return null; } return JSON.stringify({symbol:'ETH',screen:'position_detail',size:t('perps-position-size-value')||labelValue('Size'),margin:t('perps-position-margin-value'),entry:t('perps-position-entry-value'),liquidationPrice:t('perps-position-liquidation-value'),funding:t('perps-position-funding-value')}); })()
